data.name: config.about.text
data.value:
A chat overlay for FFXIV with the goal to provide a better experience for roleplayers.
For FFXIV

Contact via github.

Looking for a way to contribute or just want to take a look into GobchatEx's source code?
Visit this project on github under https://github.com/Shuro/GobchatEx

data.name: config.app.chatbox.backgroundcolor.tooltip
data.value: Overrides the theme's chat background colour. Leave empty to use the theme's colour. Transparency is set separately below.

data.name: config.app.chatbox.opacity.tooltip
data.value: How solid the chat background is. Lower values are more transparent.

data.name: config.app.ckb.actor.label
data.value: Character locations are not available. Unable to retrieve information from FFXIV.

data.name: config.app.ckb.actor.tooltip
data.value: If activated GobchatEx collects positional data about other characters to calculate the in-game distance between you and them. Some features require this data to work.

data.name: config.app.ckb.autohide.tooltip
data.value: Hides the chat overlay whenever you switch to another application, and shows it again while FFXIV or GobchatEx (e.g. its settings window) is the active window.

data.name: config.app.ckb.alwaysshow.tooltip
data.value: Keeps the chat overlay on screen even when no character is logged in. Off, the overlay appears on login and hides on logout / at the title screen.

data.name: config.app.ckb.betaupdate.tooltip
data.value: To safely test a beta update, please ensure you have a backup of your GobchatEx profile under 'AppData\Roaming\GobchatEx\config' by copying the whole folder!

data.name: config.formatting.ckb.emoteinsay.tooltip
data.value: When direct speech is marked, everything else will be automatically flagged as emote.

data.name: config.formatting.ckb.emoteinparty.tooltip
data.value: When direct speech is marked in the party channel, everything else will be automatically flagged as emote.

data.name: config.rangefilter.ckb.mentions
data.value: Exclude messages with mentions from filtering

data.name: config.mentions.ckb.usermention.tooltip
data.value: Mentions are meant to catch your attention. By checking this, you can test your mentions by yourself.

data.name: config.formatting.font-family.tooltip
data.value: Picks the first available font on your platform, from left to right. It's also possible to use a 'generic font': serif, sans-serife, monospace.

data.name: config.app.hotkeys.hideshow.tooltip
data.value: Hides or shows GobchatEx on keypress.

data.name: config.app.hotkeys.search.tooltip
data.value: Focuses the chat overlay and opens its search bar with the cursor in the search field.

data.name: config.app.intervals.actor.tooltip
data.value: Amount of milliseconds to wait between two updates. A value of 1000 means one update per second. A value of 2000 means one update every two seconds. A value of 500 means two updates per second.

data.name: config.app.intervals.chat.tooltip
data.value: Amount of milliseconds to wait between two updates. A value of 1000 means one update per second. A value of 2000 means one update every two seconds. A value of 500 means two updates per second.

data.name: config.app.process.selector
data.value: Select which FFXIV process should be used

data.name: config.app.process.selector.tooltip
data.value: If you run more than one process of FFXIV, select here to which process GobchatEx should connect. Hit the refresh button to the left of this field, select your process or any and hit the connect button to the right.

data.name: config.rangefilter.cutoff.tooltip
data.value: Hides other players' messages at this distance.

data.name: config.rangefilter.fadeout.tooltip
data.value: Starts reducing opacity of other players' messages at this distance. Message opacity declines until either the cut off is reached or the game no longer shows it.

data.name: config.rangefilter.transparency.end.tooltip
data.value: Final opacity at cut off distance, before it disappears completely.

data.name: config.rangefilter.transparency.start.tooltip
data.value: Initial opacity at fade out distance.

data.name: config.app.search.border.tooltip
data.value: Selected search result will be outlined with this color.

data.name: config.groups.tbl.group.entry.deleteconfirm
data.value: Group will be deleted. Are you sure?

data.name: config.groups.tbl.group.entry.ffgroup.info
data.value: This group represents an in-game group and will be applied to any player you have marked with {0}.

data.name: config.groups.tbl.group.entry.trigger.tooltip
data.value: A character belongs to this group when their full name is listed here. Type a name — first and last, e.g. Khada Iriq — and press Enter to add it as a chip; click the × to remove it. Matching ignores capitalization.

data.name: config.groups.tbl.group.description
data.value: Each new message will be checked against these groups here, from top to bottom. If a group matches, either by character name or symbol, the formatting of the that, and only that, group will be applied to the message. You can change the order by drag & drop.

data.name: config.groups.tbl.group.entry.moveup.tooltip
data.value: Move this group up in the list.

data.name: config.groups.tbl.group.entry.movedown.tooltip
data.value: Move this group down in the list.

data.name: config.main.button.reset.tooltip
data.value: Resets its value to its default

data.name: config.about.fork
data.value: GobchatEx is a fork of Gobchat by MarbleBag, licensed under AGPL-3.0. A roleplay-focused chat overlay for FINAL FANTASY XIV.

data.name: config.about.update.status.failed
data.value: Couldn't check for updates. Check your connection and try again.

data.name: config.about.update.status.busy
data.value: A check is already in progress.

data.name: config.about.update.status.manual
data.value: Opened the releases page in your browser.

data.name: config.main.nav.cancel.dialog
data.value: Any unsaved changes will be lost.

data.name: config.main.profileswitch.dialog
data.value: Switching profiles will discard the unsaved changes on this page.

data.name: config.channel.page.desc
data.value: Per-channel sender, text and background colours. Pick a text-colour scheme below, then fine-tune any channel.

data.name: config.channel.scheme.desc
data.value: Sets every channel's text colour to a preset. Sender and background colours are left as they are.

data.name: config.channel.scheme.tooltip
data.value: Switch all channel text colours to a preset scheme.

data.name: config.groups.page.desc
data.value: Style senders by FFXIV party markers or custom triggers.

data.name: config.formatting.page.desc
data.value: Fonts, roleplay colours and how text segments are detected.

data.name: config.tabs.page.desc
data.value: Define tabs and route channels and groups to each.

data.name: config.main.profile.copypage
data.value: Copy this page from another profile

data.name: config.mentions.audio.interval.tooltip
data.value: Amount of seconds which need to pass before a sound will be played again.

data.name: config.mentions.audio.path.tooltip
data.value: The audio file needs to be located within the sound folder of GobchatEx.

data.name: config.mentions.audio.play.tooltip
data.value: Play an audio file whenever a message contains one or more mentions.

data.name: config.mentions.audio.test.error
data.value:
Audiofile can't be played.
Either the format is not supported or the file can't be found!
Make sure to place any sound files you want to use in GobchatEx under 'resources/sounds'.

data.name: config.mentions.trigger.tooltip
data.value: Words which will trigger a mention. Press Enter or comma to add a word. Only whole words will trigger a mention. Words which appear as pre-, suf- or infix do not trigger a mention.

data.name: config.mentions.page.desc
data.value: Words and names that highlight messages, plus the alert sound.

data.name: config.mentions.channellist.desc
data.value: Choose which channels can trigger a mention.

data.name: config.mentions.player.enable.tooltip
data.value: Highlight messages that contain the name of the character you are currently logged in as.

data.name: config.mentions.player.enable.desc
data.value: Remembers each character you log in as and mentions its name while you play it.

data.name: config.mentions.player.empty
data.value: No characters yet. Log into a character and it will appear here.

data.name: config.mentions.player.character.active.tooltip
data.value: Enable player mentions for this character.

data.name: config.mentions.player.character.moveup.tooltip
data.value: Move this character up in the list.

data.name: config.mentions.player.character.movedown.tooltip
data.value: Move this character down in the list.

data.name: config.mentions.player.character.delete.tooltip
data.value: Remove this character from the profile (only possible while you are not logged in as it).

data.name: config.mentions.player.character.delete.confirm
data.value: Remove this character from the player mentions list?

data.name: config.mentions.player.matchfirst.partial.tooltip
data.value: Also flags this character's first name when it appears inside a longer word. Only the matching part is highlighted. Off by default.

data.name: config.mentions.player.matchlast.partial.tooltip
data.value: Also flags this character's surname when it appears inside a longer word. Only the matching part is highlighted. Off by default.

data.name: config.mentions.player.miqote.tooltip
data.value: For a Miqo'te first name containing an apostrophe, also match the main part of the name. No effect on names without an apostrophe. Off by default.

data.name: config.mentions.player.fuzzy.tooltip
data.value: Also flags slightly misspelt versions of this character's names — missing, extra or swapped letters and dropped apostrophes (e.g. "Jon" or "Jhon" for "John", "Gobchatt" for "Gobchat"). Off by default.

data.name: config.mentions.player.fuzzy.level.tooltip
data.value: How forgiving fuzzy matching is. Conservative allows the fewest typos; Aggressive the most (but is more likely to flag ordinary words).

data.name: config.mentions.player.custom.label
data.value: Extra words (only while logged in as this character)

data.name: config.mentions.ckb.usermention.desc
data.value: Highlight messages where you mention yourself.

data.name: config.mentions.audio.play.desc
data.value: Audible alert when a trigger word appears.

data.name: config.mentions.rangefilter.desc
data.value: Always show mentions even when the speaker is out of range.

data.name: config.profiles.importprofile.error
data.value:
Profile can't be loaded.
Either the format is not supported or the file can't be found/read!

data.name: config.profiles.profile.clone.tooltip
data.value: Creates a copy of this profile.

data.name: config.profiles.profile.copy.tooltip
data.value: Overwrites this profile with another profile.

data.name: config.profiles.profile.delete.dialog.text
data.value: Delete this profile? Deletion is final after clicking save.

data.name: config.profiles.profile.export.tooltip
data.value: Export this profile to a file.

data.name: config.profiles.profile.reset.dialog.text
data.value: Restore all settings for this profile to default? Restoration is final after clicking save.

data.name: config.formatting.tbl.segment.entry.action.delete.confirm
data.value: Entry will be deleted. Are you sure?

data.name: config.formatting.tbl.segment.entry.info
data.value: They will be processed from top to down. To reorder them drag and drop the header.

data.name: main.chat.channel.random.tooltip
data.value: /random, use /dice to roll in current channel.

data.name: main.cmdmanager.cmd.group.add
data.comment: 0: player name, 1: group idx, 2: group name

data.name: main.cmdmanager.cmd.group.grouped
data.comment: 0: player name, 1: group idx, 2: group name

data.name: main.cmdmanager.cmd.group.invalid.cmd
data.value: Command 'group' expects: group groupnumber add/remove playername group groupnumber clear

data.name: main.cmdmanager.cmd.group.invalid.grpidx
data.value: Group number needs to be a number from [1, {0}].

data.name: main.cmdmanager.cmd.group.invalid.nosupport
data.value: Unable to add character. Group [{0}] {1} represents all characters you have marked with {2}. This can only be changed by the game. Or, you can create your own gobchat group under options -> groups.

data.name: main.cmdmanager.cmd.group.notgrouped
data.comment: 0: player name, 1: group idx, 2: group name

data.name: main.cmdmanager.cmd.group.remove
data.comment: 0: player name, 1: group idx, 2: group name

data.name: main.cmdmanager.cmd.group.list.empty
data.value: You have no custom groups yet. Create one under options -> groups.

data.name: main.cmdmanager.cmd.profile.load.invalid
data.value: Profile command needs a valid profile name. Available profiles are: {0}.

data.name: main.cmdmanager.cmd.unknown
data.value: Unknown command '{0}'. Type /e gc help for a list of commands.

data.name: main.cmdmanager.help.header
data.value: GobchatEx chat commands (type in-game as: /e gc <command>):

data.name: main.cmdmanager.help.group
data.value: group <number> add/remove/clear <player> [server] - Add, remove, or clear players in a custom group.

data.name: main.cmdmanager.help.group.list
data.value: group list - List your custom groups and their numbers.

data.name: main.cmdmanager.help.profile
data.value: profile load <name> - Switch to the profile with the given name.

data.name: main.cmdmanager.help.config.open
data.value: config open - Open the settings window.

data.name: main.cmdmanager.help.config.reset
data.value: config reset frame - Reset the chat overlay's size and position.

data.name: main.cmdmanager.help.player.count
data.value: player count - Show how many players are nearby.

data.name: main.cmdmanager.help.player.list
data.value: player list - List nearby players with their distance.

data.name: main.cmdmanager.help.player.distance
data.value: player distance <name> - Show your distance to a player.

data.name: main.cmdmanager.help.info
data.value: info on/off - Show or hide GobchatEx info messages.

data.name: main.cmdmanager.help.error
data.value: error on/off - Show or hide GobchatEx error messages.

data.name: main.cmdmanager.help.help
data.value: help - Show this list of commands.

data.name: config.rangefilter.page.desc
data.value: Fade or hide speakers based on their distance in-game.

data.name: config.rangefilter.preview.hint
data.value: Closer messages stay solid; distant ones fade and vanish past the cutoff.

data.name: config.rangefilter.cull.tooltip
data.value: FFXIV itself only sends these messages from players within about 20 yalm (horizontal distance), so a larger cutoff won't reveal anyone farther away.

data.name: config.chatlog.path.tooltip
data.value: Chat logs will be saved there. You can either choose to save all logs in the same folder or create multiple folders for each profile. Your old logs won't be moved.

data.name: config.chatlog.page.desc
data.value: Write chat to disk and choose which channels to record.

data.name: config.chatlog.active.desc
data.value: Save the selected channels to log files on disk.

data.name: config.chatlog.characterfolders.desc
data.value: Write each character's logs into their own subfolder, e.g. log\John Gobchat\.

data.name: config.chatlog.characterfolders.tooltip
data.value: Give each character its own log subfolder.

data.name: config.formatting.tabstyle.tooltip
data.value: How the chat tabs look (FFXIV Modern theme).

data.name: config.formatting.chatdensity.tooltip
data.value: Vertical spacing of chat lines (FFXIV Modern theme).

data.name: config.profiles.page.desc
data.value: Separate configuration sets you can switch between.

data.name: config.formatting.tbl.segment.description
data.value: These are used to determine the type of a text section.

data.name: config.app.page.desc
data.value: General appearance, behaviour and the overlay window.

data.name: config.app.language.desc
data.value: Interface language for the overlay and settings.

data.name: config.app.theme.desc
data.value: Colour scheme of the chat overlay and dialogs.

data.name: config.app.ckb.autohide.desc
data.value: Automatically hide the chat overlay while neither FFXIV nor GobchatEx is the focused window.

data.name: config.app.ckb.alwaysshow.desc
data.value: Keep the chat overlay on screen even when no character is logged in, instead of hiding it on the title screen or between logins.

data.name: config.app.ckb.update.desc
data.value: Look for a newer GobchatEx release when the app launches.

data.name: config.app.ckb.betaupdate.desc
data.value: Also offer pre-release builds when checking for updates.

data.name: config.app.ckb.actor.desc
data.value: Read nearby players from FFXIV memory (needed for the range filter).

data.name: config.app.chatbox.backgroundcolor.desc
data.value: Colour behind the chat. Leave empty to use the theme's colour.

data.name: system.greeter.noaccess
data.value: Final Fantasy XIV is running with higher privileges — restart GobchatEx as administrator

data.name: system.greeter.outdated
data.value: GobchatEx can't read this version of Final Fantasy XIV — its memory signatures are out of date
